General.Name: China Flavors and Fragrances Co Ltd
General.Description: China Boton Group Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells flavors, fragrances, and e-cigarette products in the People's Republic of China, Europe, the United States, the rest of Asia, and internationally. The company operates through Flavor Enhancers, Food Flavors, Fine Fragrances, e-Cigarette Products, and Investment Properties segments. It provides flavor enhancers that comprise tobacco fragrance products; edible flavor products for beverages, dairy, candy, baking, and savory products; and fragrances to manufacturers of cosmetics, hair care, soap, detergent, deodorant, air freshener, and other products. In addition, the company offers e-cigarette products, which include disposable and rechargeable electronic cigarettes or cigars, as well as other e-cigarette accessories, such as rechargeable e-cigarette cases, to tobacco companies, independent e-cigarette manufacturers, and other customers. Further, it is involved in leasing of properties. China Boton Group Company Limited was founded in 1991 and is based in Kowloon, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Boton Technology Innovation Tower, Kowloon, Hong Kong
